companyNameJapanese: 日本特殊陶業株式会社
description: Major ceramic components manufacturer. Supplies electrostatic chucks and ceramic parts for semiconductor manufacturing equipment through subsidiary NTK Ceratec. Renamed from NGK Spark Plug in 2023.

_externalRelationships.notes: NTK Ceratec building new Miyagi plant for semiconductor parts (2026). Multi-layer ceramic sheet technology.
